accepted.title: Semantic Communication for Cooperative Perception with HARQ
accepted.venue: International Workshop on Machine Learning for Signal Processing
accepted.reason: V2V cooperative perception with intermediate feature fusion of LiDAR data, evaluated on perception performance.

accepted.title: PerceptNet-V2X: Perception Network for Vehicle to Everything Scenarios in Autonomous Driving
accepted.reason: Intermediate collaboration V2X framework with FPV representation, evaluated on OPV2V and V2X-Real.

accepted.title: SC-MII: Infrastructure LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection on Edge Devices for Split Computing with Multiple Intermediate Outputs Integration
accepted.reason: Multiple infrastructure LiDARs share intermediate features integrated at an edge server for collaborative 3D detection.

accepted.title: Privacy-Concealing Cooperative Perception for BEV Scene Segmentation
accepted.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
accepted.reason: Cooperative perception among adjacent vehicles sharing BEV features for collaborative BEV semantic segmentation.

accepted.title: CampusSyn: A Real World Complex Environment Dataset for Vehicle-to-Vehicle Collaborative Perception
accepted.venue: International Conference on Intelligent Control and Information Processing
accepted.reason: Real-world V2V collaborative perception dataset with annotated 3D boxes and tracking IDs from two LiDAR-equipped platforms.

accepted.title: Vehicle–Road–Cloud Collaborative Perception: Resource and Intelligence Optimization
accepted.reason: Multi-agent vehicle-road-cloud collaborative perception with slimmable networks fusing multi-agent data, evaluated on perception quality.

accepted.title: A Multimodal Collaborative Perception Framework in Challenging Environments
accepted.venue: IEEE International Conference on Network Infrastructure and Digital Content
accepted.reason: BEV multimodal cooperative perception with feature fusion across heterogeneous agents, evaluated on OPV2V and DAIR-V2X-C.

accepted.title: Delay-Aware Graph Attention Framework for Collaborative Perception
accepted.reason: Delay-aware graph attention agent-selection for multi-agent collaborative perception, evaluated on OPV2V and V2XSet.

accepted.title: HGSTA: Leveraging Hypergraph Computing for Effective Collaborative Perception Feature Fusion
accepted.reason: Hypergraph-based spatiotemporal feature fusion for multi-agent collaborative perception, evaluated on three benchmarks.

accepted.title: Collaborative Perception Against Data Fabrication Attacks in Vehicular Networks
accepted.reason: CAV collaborative perception sharing LiDAR feature maps with robust fusion against fabrication attacks, evaluated on detection accuracy.

accepted.title: SComCP: Task-Oriented Semantic Communication for Collaborative Perception
accepted.reason: CAV collaborative perception with importance-aware semantic feature selection and fusion, evaluated on detection across channels.

accepted.title: Optimized Collaborative Perception: Sector-Based BEV Fusion in Limited Communication Conditions
accepted.reason: CAVs share sector-based LiDAR BEV data via RSU for collaborative perception at intersections, evaluated on perception accuracy.

accepted.title: Robust Multi-Agent Collaborative Perception via Triple-Attention and Dynamic Gating
accepted.reason: Multi-agent collaborative perception with triple-attention feature fusion and dynamic gating, evaluated on two public datasets.

accepted.title: Incentivizing Point Cloud-Based Accurate Cooperative Perception for Connected Vehicles
accepted.reason: Cooperative perception among connected vehicles sharing point-cloud areas with an incentive mechanism, evaluated on bandwidth and accuracy.

accepted.title: On the Road to AIoT: A Framework for Vehicle Road Cooperation
accepted.reason: Vehicle-infrastructure cooperative framework fusing ego and infrastructure information for trajectory prediction, evaluated against PP-VIC.

accepted.title: Co-MTP: A Cooperative Trajectory Prediction Framework with Multi-Temporal Fusion for Autonomous Driving
accepted.venue: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
accepted.reason: V2X cooperative trajectory prediction fusing multi-agent history and future features, evaluated on V2X-Seq.

accepted.title: Co-HTTP: Cooperative Trajectory Prediction with Heterogeneous Graph Transformer for Autonomous Driving
accepted.venue: 2024 IEEE 27th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)
accepted.reason: Vehicle-infrastructure cooperative trajectory prediction with heterogeneous graph transformer, evaluated on V2X-Seq.

accepted.title: Multiuser Semantic Communication With Concurrent Access for Collaborative Sensing in Internet of Vehicles
accepted.reason: Cooperative collaborative sensing in IoV with multi-vehicle semantic feature fusion, evaluated on OPV2V average precision.

accepted.title: Semantic Communication System for Multi-Vehicle 3D Point Cloud Fusion-Based Object Detection
accepted.venue: 2026 International Conference on Communication Networks and Machine Learning (CNML)
accepted.reason: Multi-vehicle collaborative 3D detection with semantic feature encoding and uncertainty-weighted V2V fusion, evaluated on detection.

accepted.title: Semantic Communication Empowered Collaborative Perception in Constrained Networks
accepted.reason: Collaborative perception framework extracting task-oriented semantic features for multi-agent fusion, evaluated on perception performance.

accepted.title: A Two-Stage Clustering Method for Point Clouds Based on Cooperative Perception of Vehicle-to-Vehicle
accepted.venue: International Conference on Mechatronics and Robotics Engineering
accepted.reason: V2V cooperative perception with point-cloud-level information fusion and two-stage clustering for occluded-object detection.

accepted.title: GCP: Guarded Collaborative Perception with Spatial-Temporal Aware Malicious Agent Detection
accepted.venue: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
accepted.reason: Collaborative perception among CAVs with BEV feature sharing and robust malicious-agent detection, evaluated on AP.

accepted.title: Task-Oriented Wireless Communications for Collaborative Perception in Intelligent Unmanned Systems
accepted.reason: Collaborative perception with channel-adaptive feature compression, robust fusion and collaborator scheduling, verified in connected autonomous driving case studies.

accepted.title: Cooperative Perception with Deep Reinforcement Learning in Vehicular Networks
accepted.venue: International Conference on Mobile Ad-hoc and Sensor Networks
accepted.reason: Vehicular cooperative perception with RL-based collaborator/content selection and late fusion, evaluated on perception confidence.
